events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: Eight decades young and still making magic. Wishing a very happy 84th birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! What's your favourite McCartney moment, solo or with The Beatles?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Voice
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! That voice is simply unmistakable. What's the Alison Moyet track that always gets you?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy Award-winning artist Lionel Richie, famous for his soulful ballads and global hits, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It is! Happy 77th birthday to the legend, Lionel Richie. So many timeless hits, but which one is your ultimate favourite?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Iconic singer Cyndi Lauper, known for her vibrant style and anthemic pop hits, celebrates her 73rd birthday today.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the absolute icon, Cyndi Lauper! Her music and style have always been brilliantly unique. What's your favourite Cyndi track?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. The pop superstar passed away in 2016.

angles.name: Tribute to George
angles.copy: Thinking of the phenomenal George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move millions. What's the George Michael song that means the most to you?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the death of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who passed away on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Remembered
angles.copy: 17 years ago today, we lost the incomparable Michael Jackson. His impact on music and culture remains unmatched. What's your enduring memory of the King of Pop?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, known globally as Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! The man who kept the beat for the Fab Four. What's your favourite Ringo moment? Peace and love!

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero May
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Sir Brian May! From stadium rock anthems to astrophysics, what an incredible life. What's your favourite Brian May guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger Still Rolling
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: MTV, Music Television, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Music Television Revolution
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did you watch it from the beginning? What was your favourite early MTV memory?

events.title: 32 years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and shook up the music scene. What's your favourite track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place in August 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for Woodstock. A festival that defined a generation. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years today since we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to reign supreme. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died six days later on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, we lost a true music icon, Tupac Shakur. His lyrics and impact are still felt today. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix Forever
angles.copy: 56 years ago today, we lost a true guitar god, Jimi Hendrix. His innovative playing changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track or live performance?

events.title: 57 years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, in the UK, with the US release following on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure genius. What's your go-to track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Rock Spirit
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the effortlessly cool Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that commands attention. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Britpop icon and former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment, solo or with Oasis?

events.title: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single release
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in 1975, following its US release in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' single hit the UK. A song that still resonates globally with its powerful message of peace. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod release
events.blurb: Apple launched the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: iPod's Silver Anniversary
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since Apple first launched the iPod? It truly changed how we listened to music. Did you have one of the originals?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, what's your favourite 007 movie or moment? License to thrill us with your answers!
